articles.title: Nobel Lecture: Creative Destruction and Economic Growth
articles.title_cn: 诺贝尔演讲：创造性破坏与经济增长

articles.title: Nobel Lecture: The Past and Future of Innovation: Can Progress Be Sustained?
articles.title_cn: 诺贝尔演讲：创新的过去与未来：进步能否持续？

articles.title: Nobel Lecture: The Economics of Creative Destruction
articles.title_cn: 诺贝尔演讲：创造性破坏的经济学

articles.title: A Welfare Analysis of Policies Impacting Climate Change
articles.authors: Robert W. Hahn, Nathaniel Hendren, Robert D. Metcalfe, Ben Sprung-Keyser
articles.abstract: We study the welfare impacts of 96 climate-related tax and spending policies. We extend and apply the marginal value of public funds (MVPF) framework, most notably providing a new method for incorporating learning-by-doing spillovers. We find subsidies for the production of clean energy (such as wind production tax credits) have higher MVPFs than all other subsidies in our sample, including EV subsidies. Conservation nudges have large MVPFs when targeting regions with dirty grids. Fuel taxes and cap-and-trade policies are highly efficient means of raising revenue. We also construct traditional cost-per-ton estimates and compare and contrast the lessons they provide.
articles.title_cn: 对影响气候变化政策的福利分析
articles.abstract_cn: 我们研究了96项与气候相关的税收和支出政策的福利影响。我们扩展并应用了公共基金边际价值（MVPF）框架，最显著的是提供了一种新的方法来纳入边做边学溢出效应。我们发现，清洁能源生产的补贴（如风力发电税收抵免）的MVPF值高于我们样本中的所有其他补贴，包括电动汽车补贴。当针对污染严重的电网区域时，保护性提示具有较大的MVPF值。燃油税和总量管制与交易政策是提高收入的高效手段。我们还构建了传统的每吨成本估计，并比较和对比它们提供的教训。

articles.title: Monetary Policy without Commitment
articles.authors: Hassan Afrouzi, Marina Halac, Kenneth Rogoff, Pierre Yared
articles.abstract: This paper studies the implications of central bank credibility for long-run inflation and inflation dynamics. We introduce central bank lack of commitment into a standard nonlinear New Keynesian economy with sticky-price monopolistically competitive firms. Inflation is driven by the interaction of lack of commitment and the economic environment. We show that long-run inflation increases following an unanticipated permanent increase in the labor wedge or decrease in the elasticity of substitution across varieties. In the transition, inflation overshoots and then gradually declines. Quantitatively, inflation overshooting is persistent, and the welfare loss from lack of commitment relative to inflation targeting is large.
articles.abstract_cn: 本文研究了中央银行信誉对长期通胀和通胀动态的影响。我们在标准的非线性新凯恩斯经济中引入了中央银行缺乏承诺的情况，其中存在粘性价格的垄断竞争型企业。通胀受到缺乏承诺和经济环境之间相互作用的驱动。我们展示了在劳动力楔子意外永久增加或跨品种替代弹性下降之后，长期通胀会增加。在过渡期间，通胀会超调，然后逐渐下降。从数量上看，通胀超调是持久的，相对于通胀目标制，缺乏承诺导致的福利损失是巨大的。

articles.title: Market Opacity and Fragility: Why Liquidity Evaporates When It Is Most Needed
articles.abstract: Lack of market transparency can impair the liquidity provision of nonstandard liquidity suppliers and make liquidity demand increasing in illiquidity. This can yield strategic complementarities and induce multiple equilibria. Then an initial dearth of liquidity may degenerate into a liquidity rout (as in a "flash crash"), and traders faced with the largest cost of trading are those trading more intensely at equilibrium. An increase in order flow transparency and/or in the mass of dealers who are in the market at all times has a positive impact on total welfare.
articles.title_cn: 市场不透明与脆弱性：为什么流动性在最需要时消失
articles.abstract_cn: 市场透明度的缺乏可能会损害非标准流动性供应商的流动性供应，并使流动性需求在流动性不足时增加。这可能产生策略互补性并引发多重均衡。然后，最初的流动性匮乏可能演变成流动性溃败（如“闪电崩盘”），在均衡时面临最大交易成本的交易者是那些在均衡时更积极交易的交易者。增加订单流透明度和/或增加始终在市场上的交易商数量对总福利有积极影响。

articles.title: The Aggregate Costs of Uninsurable Business Risk
articles.authors: Corina Boar, Denis Gorea, Virgiliu Midrigan
articles.abstract: We use firm-level data to document that private businesses experience large fluctuations in their profit shares. These are due to large, fat-tailed, and transitory changes in output that are not fully accompanied by changes in their inputs. We interpret this evidence using a model of entrepreneurial dynamics. Because firms can limit their exposure to risk by operating at a smaller scale, our model predicts large macroeconomic losses from uninsurable business risk,much larger than those stemming from credit constraints. While self-financing allows entrepreneurs to quickly overcome credit constraints, even wealthy entrepreneurs remain considerably exposed to risk.
articles.title_cn: 不可保险商业风险的总体成本
articles.abstract_cn: 我们利用公司层面的数据记录了私营企业在利润份额上的巨大波动。这些波动是由于产出中大的、厚尾的、暂时性的变化，而这些变化并没有完全伴随着投入的变化。我们使用一个关于创业动态的模型来解释这一证据。由于公司可以通过在较小规模运营来限制它们对风险的暴露，我们的模型预测，不可保险的商业风险导致的宏观经济损失将非常大，远大于由信贷约束引起的损失。尽管自筹资金使企业家能够迅速克服信贷约束，但即使是富有的企业家仍然面临相当大的风险暴露。

articles.title: Understanding High-Wage Firms: Monopoly, Monopsony, and Bargaining Power
articles.abstract: I study how firm market power and worker bargaining power shape wages and welfare. Using French micro-data, I document patterns linking wages and firm market power that existing models cannot explain. A model in which firms produce vertically differentiated goods and share profits with workers explains those patterns. The model (i) reveals new challenges in estimating monopsony and bargaining power, proposing an alternative approach; (ii) shows that the pass-through of firm-specific shocks to wages depends on the type of shock; (iii) explains how markups shape firm wage premia; and (iv) formalizes how strengthening worker bargaining power affects wages and welfare.
articles.title_cn: 理解高工资公司：垄断、买方垄断和议价能力
articles.abstract_cn: 我研究公司市场力量和工人议价能力如何影响工资和福利。利用法国的微观数据，我记录了工资与公司市场力量之间的联系模式，这些模式是现有模型无法解释的。一个公司生产垂直差异化商品并与工人分享利润的模型可以解释这些模式。该模型（i）揭示了在估计垄断买方和议价能力方面的新挑战，提出了一种替代方法；（ii）表明公司特定冲击向工资的传递取决于冲击的类型；（iii）解释了加成如何塑造公司工资溢价；以及（iv）正式化了加强工人议价能力如何影响工资和福利。

articles.title: Self-Fulfilling Fluctuations in HANK Economies
articles.abstract: We show that in heterogeneous agent New Keynesian (HANK) economies with countercyclical risk, the natural interest rate is endogenous and co-moves with output, leaving the economy susceptible to self-fulfilling fluctuations. Unlike in representative agent New Keynesian models, the Taylor principle is not sufficient to guarantee uniqueness of equilibrium in HANK if risk is even mildly countercyclical: Multiple bounded equilibria exist, no matter how strongly monetary policy responds to changes in inflation. For an active monetary policy to eliminate self-fulfilling fluctuations, it must stabilize the endogenous natural rate fluctuations. Alternatively, a passive monetary and active fiscal regime can also eliminate equilibrium multiplicity.
articles.title_cn: HANK经济中的自我实现波动
articles.abstract_cn: 我们展示了在具有逆周期风险的异质性代理新凯恩斯主义（HANK）经济中，自然利率是内生的，并且与产出共动，使经济容易受到自我实现波动的影响。与代表性代理新凯恩斯主义模型不同，如果风险甚至是轻微的逆周期性，泰勒原则不足以保证HANK中均衡的唯一性：无论货币政策对通货膨胀变化的反应有多强烈，都存在多个有界的均衡。要通过积极的货币政策消除自我实现的波动，它必须稳定内生的自然利率波动。或者，被动的货币和积极的财政政策制度也可以消除均衡的多重性。

articles.title: Ideological Alignment and Evidence-Based Policy Adoption
articles.authors: Jorge García-Hombrados, Marcel Jansen, Ángel Martínez, Berkay Özcan, Pedro Rey-Biel, Antonio Roldán- Monés
articles.abstract: The implementation of evidence-based policies hinges on the dissemination of evidence to policymakers, a process influenced by the attributes of the sender. We conducted a nationwide RCT with ideologically opposite think tanks, major newspapers, and a research institution with nonsalient ideology to communicate a nonideological, cost-effective policy to local policymakers. Results show a 65 percent increase in policy adoption when informing institutions align ideologically with policymakers. We compare the impact of think tanks versus media outlets on implementation, finding both equally effective when ideologically aligned. We explore three actions where ideology may influence adoption: information exposure, belief updating and implementation.
articles.title_cn: 意识形态对齐与基于证据的政策采纳
articles.abstract_cn: 实施循证政策的关键在于将证据传播给政策制定者，这一过程受到信息发送者属性的影响。我们进行了一项全国性的随机对照试验（RCT），涉及意识形态对立的智库、主要报纸和意识形态不显著的研究机构，以向地方政策制定者传达一项非意识形态的、具有成本效益的政策。结果显示，当通知机构与政策制定者在意识形态上一致时，政策采纳率增加了65%。我们比较了智库与媒体机构在实施上的影响，发现在意识形态一致时两者同样有效。我们探讨了意识形态可能影响采纳的三个行动：信息曝光、信念更新和实施。

articles.title: Germs in the Family: The Short- and Long-Term Consequences of Intrahousehold Disease Spread
articles.authors: N. Meltem Daysal, Hui Ding, Maya Rossin-Slater, Hannes Schwandt
articles.abstract: Preschool-aged children get sick frequently and spread disease to other family members. Despite the universality of this experience, there is limited causal evidence on the magnitudes and consequences of these externalities, especially for infant siblings with developing immune systems and brains. We show in Danish administrative data that during infancy, younger siblings have two to three times higher hospitalization rates for respiratory conditions than older siblings. We combine birth order and within-municipality variation in respiratory disease prevalence among young children, finding lasting differential impacts of early-life respiratory disease exposure on younger siblings' earnings, educational attainment, chronic respiratory health, and mental health-related outcomes.
articles.title_cn: 家庭中的细菌：家庭内部疾病传播的短期和长期后果
articles.abstract_cn: 学龄前儿童经常生病，并将疾病传播给其他家庭成员。尽管这种经历普遍存在，但关于这些外部性的大小和后果的因果证据有限，特别是对于正在发育的免疫系统和大脑的婴儿兄弟姐妹。我们在丹麦的行政数据中显示，在婴儿期，弟弟妹妹因呼吸道疾病住院的比率是哥哥姐姐的两到三倍。我们结合了出生顺序和同一市内儿童呼吸道疾病流行率的变化，发现早期呼吸道疾病暴露对弟弟妹妹的收入、教育成就、慢性呼吸道健康和心理健康相关结果有持久的差异影响。

articles.title: The Effect of Omitted Variables on the Sign of Regression Coefficients
articles.abstract: We show that, depending on how the impact of omitted variables is measured, it can be substantially easier for omitted variables to flip coefficient signs than to drive them to zero. This behavior occurs with "Oster's delta" (Oster 2019a), a widely reported robustness measure. Consequently, any time this measure is large—suggesting omitted variables may be unimportant—a much smaller value reverses the sign of the parameter of interest. We propose a modified measure of robustness to address this concern. We illustrate our results in four empirical applications and two meta-analyses. We implement our methods in the companion Stata module "regsensitivity."
articles.title_cn: 省略变量对回归系数符号的影响
articles.abstract_cn: 我们展示了，根据衡量遗漏变量影响的方法不同，遗漏变量更有可能改变系数的符号，而不是将其驱动至零。这种行为出现在“Oster's delta”（Oster 2019a）中，这是一个被广泛报告的稳健性度量。因此，任何时候当这个度量值较大——暗示遗漏变量可能不重要时——一个更小的值就会反转感兴趣的参数的符号。我们提出了一个修改后的稳健性度量来解决这个问题。我们在四个实证应用和两个元分析中展示了我们的结果。我们在配套的Stata模块“regsensitivity”中实现了我们的方法。

articles.title: A Theory of Price Caps on Nonrenewable Resources
articles.authors: Simon Johnson, Lukasz Rachel, Catherine Wolfram
articles.abstract: What is the optimal response of a resource exporter when a price cap is imposed on its main export? This paper develops a dynamic framework incorporating stochastic prices, financial frictions, and market power to study this novel tool of statecraft. With the right design, a price cap can incentivize increased extraction, stabilizing prices in the global market. But the stabilizing effects diminish when there is leakage outside the cap. Consequently, weak enforcement of the policy worsens the trade-off faced by the sanctioning policymaker. We provide a systematic approach to setting and enforcing an optimal cap level in these circumstances.
articles.title_cn: 非可再生资源价格上限的理论
articles.abstract_cn: 当一个主要出口商品的价格上限被施加时，资源出口国的最佳反应是什么？本文建立了一个包含随机价格、金融摩擦和市场力量的动态框架，以研究这种新颖的国家手段。如果设计得当，价格上限可以激励增加开采，稳定全球市场的价格。但是，当存在上限之外的泄漏时，稳定效应会减弱。因此，政策执行力度的不足会加剧制裁政策制定者面临的权衡。我们提供了一种系统的方法，在这些情况下设定和执行最优的价格上限水平。

articles.title: The Effect of High-Tech Clusters on the Productivity of Top Inventors: Comment
articles.abstract: Moretti (2021) reports a positive elasticity between technology cluster size and patenting, and uses an event study and instrumental variables regressions to justify a causal interpretation. The event study does not use the variation generated by inventors moving across cities, and the instrument is constructed incorrectly due to a coding error. I run a corrected event study and fix the coding error, and find null effects. The reported elasticity may not be causal.
articles.title_cn: 对高科技集群对顶尖发明家生产力影响的评论
articles.abstract_cn: 莫雷蒂（2021年）报告了技术集群规模与专利申请之间的正弹性，并使用事件研究和工具变量回归来证明因果解释。事件研究没有使用发明者跨城市流动产生的变异，而工具变量由于编码错误构建不正确。我进行了修正的事件研究并修正了编码错误，发现没有效果。报告的弹性可能不是因果关系。
